caption: A woman with blonde hair tied back in a ponytail is speaking while wearing a black t-shirt that reads "WHO'S IN YOUR". She is positioned against a textured purple backdrop and is wearing a thin headset microphone. In the initial sequence, she is facing forward, gesturing with both hands as she speaks. As the scene progresses, she turns her head to her right, continuing to speak while maintaining her hand gestures. The camera remains in a medium shot, focusing on her upper body and expressions. A small portion of another person is visible on the far right edge of the frames, but they remain mostly off-screen. The lighting is consistent across the sequence, highlighting the woman's face and the texture of the purple wall behind her.
